assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly shows `.AddServerSideSessions()` on the builder chain with exact code examples.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddOperationalStore with UseSqlServer using the connection string from configuration
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `.AddOperationalStore(options => { options.ConfigureDbContext = builder => builder.UseSqlServer(connectionString, ...) })` pattern.
SKILL.md explicitly shows `options.ServerSideSessions.UserDisplayNameClaimType = "name";` with an explanation that it's null by default due to PII.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does not rely on the default in-memory session store for production use
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly warns against in-memory stores in production and shows EF Core as the production replacement.
